title: UAE makes history with launch of first ever licensed sports betting and iGaming platform
summary_full: The United Arab Emirates has launched its first licensed online gaming platform, Play971. This marks a significant step in the country's regulated gaming industry. The platform offers sports wagering and internet gaming options. Users must be 21 and present in the UAE. This development signals a new era for regulated commercial gaming in the nation.
